# comfyui_prompt_artifact (Resource)

Materializes Terraform-owned ComfyUI prompt JSON to a file on disk.

## Example Usage

```terraform
locals {
  prompt_json = jsonencode({
    "1" = {
      class_type = "LoadImage"
      inputs = {
        image = "example.png"
      }
    }
    "2" = {
      class_type = "SaveImage"
      inputs = {
        images          = ["1", 0]
        filename_prefix = "artifact_example"
      }
    }
  })
}

resource "comfyui_prompt_artifact" "example" {
  path         = "${path.module}/prompt.json"
  content_json = local.prompt_json
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `content_json` (String) Exact ComfyUI prompt JSON to persist.
- `path` (String) File path where the prompt JSON should be written.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Managed artifact identifier, equal to the absolute file path.
- `sha256` (String) SHA-256 hash of the persisted prompt JSON.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import comfyui_prompt_artifact.example ./prompt.json
```
